name: simple-cdk-monorepo
description: Build on AWS without being an AWS expert.
author: Pujan Bhatta <pujan@csidryeye.com> (https://github.com/pujaaan)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @simple-cdk/core && npm run build -w @simple-cdk/lambda -w @simple-cdk/dynamodb -w @simple-cdk/cognito && npm run build -w @simple-cdk/appsync && npm run build -w simple-cdk
scripts.publish:all: npm run build && npm publish --workspaces --access public
